title: Imperial Species Preservation Zone
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''Imperial Species Preservation Zone''' was an area designated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for the preservation of a certain [[Species/Legends|species]]. [[Planet/Legends|Planets]] falling under the authorization of this edict were considered restricted to civilian travel.

==History==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dar'Or]] was declared an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Species/Legends|Species]] Preservation Zone shortly after it was conquered by the Empire prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref> Creatures under protection of this act included the winged [[Ri'Dar]], the predatorial [[indola]], and the avian [[elix]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}}
